steps.title: Two ways to run a Survey
steps.description: AhaSlides Surveys work in two modes. Build a survey once, then either share a standalone link for people to fill in at their own pace — or drop it into your presentation as a live slide. Let's walk through both. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Open Surveys
steps.description: Click 'Surveys' in the left sidebar. This is where you create and manage all your surveys — separate from your presentations.

steps.title: The Surveys dashboard
steps.description: Here you can see all your surveys with their response counts and status. Start a new survey from AI generation, a template, or from scratch.

steps.title: Build your survey
steps.description: Inside the editor, add questions — Multiple Choice, Rating Scale, Open-ended, or Matrix. Mark questions required, attach images, and mix types in any order.

steps.title: Publish and share a link
steps.description: Hit Publish — the status changes from Draft to Published. Then copy the respondent link and share it by email, QR code, or any channel. Participants open it in any browser, no account needed.

steps.title: Or: add Survey as a slide
steps.description: Back in your presentation, add a new slide and select the Survey slide type. Link it to your published survey. When you reach that slide during a live session, the full survey appears on every participant's device — right there in the room.

steps.title: Check results any time
steps.description: The Responses column in your Surveys list tracks submissions in real time. Click 'View results' to see answers question by question — whether the survey ran standalone or as a live slide.
